$comment: Meridian instance of layers/07-governance/templates/risk-tier-policy.json. Fictional. Same dimensions as BrightPath — the kernel is scale-invariant; what grows is the rule set, and even that stays SHORT because the dimensions carry the load.

rules.why: money to external parties: two approvers or a capability token, always
bulk export of regulated driver data is forbidden to agents in any tier; humans use the compliance workbench
changing compiled compliance rules is a policy.update-class action
changing the rules is the highest-risk action in the system
telos is human-authored only — invariant at every scale
